creator: ports@nicandneal.net
text:
On 2014-04-06 22:30, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of lang/nimrod,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/188326 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/188326
> 

Sorry for the delay in responding, but all the notifications ended up in
my span quarantine.

I have posted about the pr to the Nimrod forum, so I would like to wait
for feedback before the patch is committed.

Regards,

Neal.
